scripts.identity: For the man who's been running on empty and doesn't know why.
scripts.shift: Your baseline got buried. Not lost. Buried.
scripts.cta: Return to it. Link in bio.

scripts.hook: Modern life made you weak without you noticing.
scripts.identity: No one told you this was happening.
scripts.shift: Noise does that. Strip it away and see what's left.

scripts.hook: Why do you feel off even when everything is 'fine'?
scripts.identity: Job's good. Relationships okay. But something's missing.
scripts.shift: That's disconnection. Not depression. Not failure.
scripts.cta: There's a name for it. Link in bio.

scripts.hook: You wake up tired. You scroll. You repeat.
scripts.identity: That loop isn't rest. It's avoidance.
scripts.shift: Breaking it starts with one different choice.

scripts.hook: I built this because nothing else worked.
scripts.identity: Not for everyone. For the ones still looking.
scripts.shift: This is not a product. It's a return.

scripts.hook: City version of you vs real version of you.
scripts.identity: One is performance. One is truth.
scripts.shift: Most men never meet the second one.
scripts.cta: Don't be most men. Link in bio.

scripts.hook: There's a reason you feel this way. No one talks about it.
scripts.identity: It's not weakness. It's disconnection from your source.
scripts.shift: Once you see it, you can't unsee it.

scripts.identity: If you scrolled this far, it might be for you.
scripts.shift: The men who get it — get it immediately.

scripts.identity: You've known something needed to change.
scripts.shift: This is the signal you were looking for.
scripts.cta: Return to your origin. Link in bio.

visual_notes.text: Minimal overlay — one line at a time
visual_notes.avoid: Hype, fast cuts, bright colors, music drops
